team_name: “Samanvaya: A UBID-Centric Interoperability Layer for Real-Time Government System Synchronization”
summary: Design a layer that propagates service requests bidirectionally between Karnataka's Single Window System and legacy department systems using the Unique Business Identifier (UBID) as the common join key.
optimization_claims: Ensures at least once delivery of updates using retry logic and exponential backoff.
Prevents redundant updates by hashing payloads.
constraints_addressed: Fragmented architecture between Single Window System and departmental databases
Inconsistent critical business data across platforms
